title: pavonia ovaliphylla
intro: Pavonia ovaliphylla, also known as Rock Rose or Mexican Rose, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Pavonia ovaliphylla is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or topical application, and it has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to promote overall well-being.
